meaning: 蜷画棊(菴堺ｺ惹ｸｭ蝗ｽ荳懷圏蝨ｰ蛹ｺ荳ｭ驛ｨ)
examples: Earthquakes often happen and you may hear about the earthquake in Songyuan of Jilin Province these days.
An earthquake happened in Songyuan, Jilin on the morning of May 28, 2018.
Changbai Mountain in Jilin Province is a good place to have fun.
Jilin Baoyuanfeng produces 67, 000 tons of processed chicken per year and employs about 1, 200 people.
Nearby is one of the biggest producers of broiler chickens in China, Jilin Deda Co.
